falsification_conditions.condition: Price increases by 15% or more above the current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant upward move would contradict the blowoff pattern and suggest a continuation of the trend rather than a reversal, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 200-day moving average crosses above the 50-day moving average with a volume surge (>50% above 30-day average)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A bullish crossover in moving averages with increased volume would indicate a new uptrend, directly opposing the blowoff pattern's expected decline.

falsification_conditions.condition: Relative Strength Index (RSI) forms a bullish divergence (price makes lower lows while RSI makes higher lows) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Bullish divergence would signal sustained buying pressure, contradicting the blowoff pattern's expectation of exhaustion and invalidating the HOLD verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
